snippet: Los Angeles County residents directly impacted by fires can request property at no cost to support their recovery efforts. **Anyone needing property records should call us at (800) 201-8999, option 3, or email** [**RRCCFireAssistance@rrcc.lacounty.gov**](mailto:RRCCFireAssistance@rrcc.lacounty.gov "mailto:rrccfireassistance@rrcc.lacounty.gov")
